extra.reason: Implemented pj census JSON and live stdlib dashboard server with signature-aware refresh; tests pass.
Implemented search sort modes, project scoping, multi-term matching, regex search, and fixed filesystem search limiting so newer matches are not crowded out by root order.
Added pj --version and bumped the pre-1.0 feature release version to 0.2.0.
Made pj search help teach project scoping, multi-term search, regex, sort modes, and phrase-search pitfalls; added no-result hint for quoted multi-word searches.
Added pj search --here to infer the current project from cwd using longest discovered project path containment; documented and tested success/error behavior.
Changed Codex resume command formatting from codex --resume <id> to codex resume <id>, updated CLI/help docs, and covered with tests.
